testcase.name: test_alerts_summary

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'by_severity' in {'alerts': [{'amount': 220000, 'client_id': 'client_2', 'client_name': 'Chen Investment Trust', 'excess': 188555.0, ...}, {'client_id': 'client_3', 'client_name': 'Thompson SMSF', 'details': {'Cash': {'action': 'reduce', 'current': 42, 'drift': 22, 'target': 20}, 'Equities': {'action': 'increase', 'current': 22, 'drift': -3, 'target': 25}, 'Fixed Income': {'action': 'increase', 'current': 28, 'drift': -17, 'target': 45}, 'Property': {'action': 'increase', 'current': 8, 'drift': -2, 'target': 10}}, 'max_drift': 22, ...}, {'amount': 320000, 'client_id': 'client_3', 'client_name': 'Thompson SMSF', 'excess': 247240.0, ...}, {'amount': 450000, 'client_id': 'client_4', 'client_name': 'Patel Holdings', 'excess': 362500.0, ...}, {'client_id': 'client_4', 'client_name': 'Patel Holdings', 'cost_basis': 85000, 'current_value': 52000, ...}, {'client_id': 'client_5', 'client_name': 'Garcia Family', 'details': {'Cash': {'action': 'reduce', 'current': 23, 'drift': 18, 'target': 5}, 'Equities': {'action': 'increase', 'current': 35, 'drift': -15, 'target': 50}, 'Fixed Income': {'action': 'increase', 'current': 18, 'drift': -7, 'target': 25}, 'Property': {'action': 'reduce', 'current': 24, 'drift': 4, 'target': 20}}, 'max_drift': 18, ...}, ...], 'generated_at': '2026-03-17T03:38:46.882425+00:00', 'high_priority': 6, 'total_alerts': 14}
